products.name: Totoro Large Plush

products.name: Catbus Plush
products.description: Fluffy Catbus plush toy from My Neighbor Totoro, complete with glowing eyes.

products.name: No-Face Vinyl Figure
products.description: Detailed vinyl figure of the mysterious No-Face from Spirited Away.

products.name: Chihiro & Haku Figure Set
products.description: Collector's set featuring Chihiro and Haku in dragon form from Spirited Away.

products.name: Soot Sprite Set (12 pcs)
products.description: Set of 12 adorable soot sprite mini plushies as seen in Spirited Away and My Neighbor Totoro.

products.name: Calcifer Enamel Pin
products.description: Cheerful enamel pin of Calcifer the fire demon from Howl's Moving Castle.

products.name: Howl's Moving Castle Model Kit
products.description: Detailed paper model kit of Howl's iconic moving castle.

products.name: Jiji Cat Plush
products.description: Soft and elegant black cat plush inspired by Jiji from Kiki's Delivery Service.

products.name: Kiki Ceramic Mug
products.description: Hand-painted ceramic mug featuring Kiki flying on her broomstick.

products.name: Princess Mononoke San Figure
products.description: Highly detailed figure of San from Princess Mononoke with her wolf companions.

products.name: Yubaba Resin Figure

products.name: Nausicaa of the Valley Pin Set
products.description: Set of 3 enamel pins featuring Nausicaa, Mehve glider and Ohm.

products.name: Ponyo Glass Figure
products.description: Adorable hand-blown glass figure of Ponyo running on the waves.

products.name: Totoro Umbrella
products.description: Full-size umbrella with a Totoro handle and forest-print canopy.

products.name: Spirited Away Tapestry

products.name: Radish Spirit Bobblehead
products.description: Wobbly bobblehead of the gentle Radish Spirit from Spirited Away.

products.name: My Neighbor Totoro Puzzle (1000 pcs)
products.description: 1000-piece jigsaw puzzle of the iconic forest scene from My Neighbor Totoro.

products.name: Spirited Away Tote Bag
